props.name: text
props.description: The text displayed on the plane in the ASCII scene.

props.name: enableWaves
props.description: If false, disables the wavy text animation.

props.name: asciiFontSize
props.description: Size of the ASCII glyphs in the overlay.

props.name: textFontSize
props.description: Pixel size for the text that's drawn onto the plane texture.

props.name: planeBaseHeight
props.description: How tall the plane is in 3D. The plane width is auto-based on text aspect.

props.name: textColor
props.description: The color of the text drawn onto the plane texture.

props.name: strokeColor
props.description: Not used here, but you could add it if you want an outline effect.
